string.text: Shroud, where are you? This is bad... We shouldn't have gone down to the lab. I knew it...
Great job, Shroud. The elevator is working now. I'm waiting for you downstairs.
Head upstairs. I'll be waiting for you in Garbage.
Shroud, can you hear me? Are you still alive? I'm on the lower level, in the control room. Something strange is happening on the cameras!

Shroud, keep moving forward. I'll be monitoring you through the cameras. I have a map here, although you should be able to find your way out of this damn place on your own. There are only a few mutants there. A couple of burers and a bloodsucker. The elevator is at the very end. Get out, I'll be right behind you.
Shroud, you found the digger's hideout. Go down, there's a stash there. The antidote should be in it. Be careful, someone might have found this place before you.
Stalker! You are on Duty territory. Come here immediately for questioning! And don't even think about running away!
Hey, come here. We have something to discuss.
You have attained the "Arena: Avenger Battle Master" achievement.
You have attained the "Arena: Bodyguard Battle Master" achievement.
You have attained the "Arena: Duel Battle Master" achievement.
You have attained the "Arena: Partner Battle Master" achievement.
You have attained the "Arena: Hunt Battle Master" achievement.
You have attained the "Arena: Survival Battle Master" achievement.
You have attained the "Arena: Absolute Champion" achievement.
